Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}They paid the price for losing.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}They're still alive. They just won't return to normal until the true key is forged.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}But... If the fires burn out, they won't come back, even after forging the key.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 12 2 54 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}Is that why you brought us all here?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 12 2 54 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}So I couldn't stop fighting once I started?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}I... I had no choice! If you don't fight, they'll take your key! I can't let you die![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 8 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}Aigis, what does she mean!? You'd tell us about something like that, right!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 12 3 54 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}I... didn't think anyone else should know.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 12 3 54 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}Everyone is doing what they feel is best... for him...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 12 3 54 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}They don't need to worry about what might happen to me too.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}Anyway... I'm sure this is what I was meant to do.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}But... That doesn't matter. You're still more important to me than anything...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}So I won't stop... even if you hate me for it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}I will protect you... no matter what.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The battle has begun...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I need to save my defeated friends...[n]So I have no choice but to keep fighting.[n]{f 1 1}
